title: Megalo's Alloys
body:
Megalo's Alloys is a direct add-on of Megalo's Metallurgy.



By mixing the correct ratio of the base metal dust, you can make alloys from AA-8000 to Zircaloy.

There are 175 alloys to play with that make blocks, ingots, nuggets and dust.


== Videos =

Mod reviewers - Please review my Mod as I would love to know what you think about it. Let me know if you have any ideas on what can be reworked or updated.

== Other Information ==

Megalo's Alloys is free to use in any modpack, no permission is needed.

If anyone wants to make their own add-on, just message me beforehand with their idea.

*My future mods are Nature, Tech, Geology and Gastronomy.

== Credits == All of the textures have been made currently by myself.
